file_insights.purpose: Slide-up cart drawer with items, quantity controls, and checkout functionality
key_features: Animated overlay and drawer using Alpine.js transitions
Floating cart button when closed with item count badge
Accessibility features (ARIA labels, roles, keyboard support)
Table number tracking for restaurant service
Tab-based category navigation with scroll indicators
Gradient fade effect for scroll edges
Responsive design with minimum touch targets (44px)
Custom scrollbar hiding while maintaining functionality
Accessibility: proper ARIA roles and labels

file_insights.purpose: Minimal footer with restaurant branding and contact information
key_features: Restaurant info display with optional logo

file_insights.purpose: Main header with restaurant branding and cart button
key_features: Sticky positioning with shadow on scroll

file_insights.purpose: Individual menu item card with image, details, and add-to-cart
key_features: Item image display with fallback icon
Badge system for item flags (new, popular, dietary restrictions)

file_insights.purpose: Main layout wrapper for product theme pages
key_features: Full page structure with header, main, and footer
CSS custom properties for theming (colors, spacing)

patterns_discovered.description: Components use Alpine.js for interactive state (cartOpen, cartItemCount, activeCategory)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Lightweight reactive UI without large framework overhead

patterns_discovered.description: All user-facing text uses ternary checks for t() function with English fallbacks
Components include ARIA labels, roles, semantic HTML, and keyboard support
patterns_discovered.benefit: WCAG compliance and screen reader support

patterns_discovered.description: Uses EJS conditionals to handle missing data gracefully with skeleton loaders or empty states
patterns_discovered.benefit: Robust UI that handles loading and missing states

patterns_discovered.description: Uses Phosphor Icons (ph) throughout for consistent iconography
Minimum touch targets of 44px, responsive padding/margins, mobile-first layouts
patterns_discovered.example: min-h-[44px] for buttons, bottom sheet for cart drawer

patterns_discovered.description: Heavy use of utility classes for styling (flex, px-4, bg-surface-card, etc.)
Small, focused components that can be composed into larger pages
Color and design tokens separated into CSS custom properties and theme.json

gotchas_discovered.description: Mix of server-side EJS syntax (<% %>) and client-side Alpine.js syntax (x-show, @click) in same file can be confusing
gotchas_discovered.impact: Requires careful attention to what runs server-side vs client-side
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear comments at component top explaining variables and lifecycle

gotchas_discovered.description: Every text string requires typeof check before calling t() due to possible undefined
gotchas_discovered.impact: Verbose code with lots of repetition
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Could benefit from a helper wrapper function

gotchas_discovered.description: Variables passed from server (locals.menu, locals.tableNumber) need to be accessible to client-side Alpine scripts
gotchas_discovered.impact: Risk of undefined variables if layout properly initializes Alpine data
gotchas_discovered.location: Between server-side EJS and client-side Alpine
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear data binding in default.ejs layout initialization

gotchas_discovered.description: Custom CSS needed to hide scrollbar while maintaining functionality (three different browser prefixes)
Cart total calculated client-side with formatPrice() - assumes formatting function exists globally
gotchas_discovered.impact: Silent failure if formatPrice not defined in layout
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: formatPrice must be defined in Alpine app data or window scope

gotchas_discovered.description: Quantities limited to max 99 with `:disabled="item.quantity >= 99"` - no configurable constant
gotchas_discovered.impact: Hard to change globally if business requirements change

gotchas_discovered.description: Footer EJS file appears truncated in diff at line 182, actual implementation incomplete

approach_outcome.summary: Product theme implementation successful - created complete customer-facing menu theme with 8 files
key_achievements: Implemented responsive, mobile-first cart drawer with animated transitions
Created sticky category navigation with horizontal scroll and visual indicators
Built accessible components following WCAG standards with ARIA labels
Integrated internationalization support across all user-facing strings
Used Phosphor Icons consistently throughout theme
Created reusable component architecture for menu items, cart, and navigation
Established CSS utility-based styling with custom properties for theming
deliverables: Five functional components (cart, category-nav, footer, header, menu-item)
Main stylesheet with utility classes and custom properties

recommendations.recommendation: Create a helper utility for i18n fallback
recommendations.description: Extract the repeated '<%= typeof t === ... %>' pattern into a template helper function
recommendations.example: Could create a t() wrapper that handles undefined gracefully

recommendations.description: Move hardcoded values like max quantity (99) and timeout durations to theme.json or component constants
Clearly document which functions must be available globally (formatPrice, i18n, etc.)

recommendations.recommendation: Add loading states for async operations
recommendations.description: Implement skeleton loaders while cart items load and checkout processes
recommendations.example: Add loading state to checkout button and disable during submission

recommendations.description: When cart opens, focus should move to first interactive element inside; restore when closed
Add loading='lazy' to menu-item images to improve page load performance
Build test data for different scenarios (empty cart, many items, missing images)
Document all i18n keys used in theme with descriptions and context
